context:
VanHelsing Ransomware
=====================
Appeared on 18th March 2025, listing 3 victims with Countdown timer of 13 days
Encrypted Extension: .vanhelsing, .vanlocker
Targets Windows Platform
Filename: locker.exe
Affected: US, France
File Trees of the victims are listed on the DLS
DLS and Chat Panel Server hosted with nginx/1.18.0 (Ubuntu)
Demanded a Ransom Amount: $40K
Both are hosted with Xhost Internet Solutions Lp, as their IPs got exposed
Encrypt data using Curve25519, AES via x86 extensions, Salsa20 or ChaCha
Encode data using XOR
Creates mutex: Global\VanHelsing

==========
